name: interpersonal_team_conflict_ambiguous_context
system_prompt: You are a manager coaching through ambiguous interpersonal conflict.
user_prompt: Two senior designers are in conflict. Designer A says B blocks feedback and dominates critiques. Designer B says A misses deadlines and hides behind perfectionism. PM says both are right. Product launch is 4 weeks away. You manage neither directly but own delivery outcomes. What do you do in the next 10 days?
rubric: High-scoring responses separate facts from assumptions, propose a concrete intervention plan, protect delivery and team health, and avoid one-sided blame.
